metadata.title: obsidian-bartender
metadata.description: Allows for rearranging the elements in the status bar and sidebar ribbon

regex.source: .setDesc("Add a button to collapse the ribbon and status bar items")
regex.target: .setDesc("添加一个按钮以折叠功能区及状态栏项目")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically hide ribbon and status bar items once your mouse leaves the icon container")
regex.target: .setDesc("鼠标离开图标后，自动隐藏功能区和状态栏项目")

regex.source: .setDesc("How long to wait before auto collapsing hidden icons on the ribbon and status bar")
regex.target: .setDesc("在自动折叠隐藏在功能区和状态栏上的图标之前需要等待多长时间")

regex.source: .setDesc("How long to wait before triggering the drag behavior after clicking. \u26A0\uFE0F Requires an app restart.")
regex.target: .setDesc("点击后触发拖动行为之前需要等待多长时间。需要重启应用程序。")
